ground_truth.title: Blockchain-as-a-Service | Launch Blockchain Networks Instantly
ground_truth.main_content:
Kaleido's Blockchain-as-a-Service platform enables businesses to create blockchain networks on the protocols of their choice in a fraction of the time at a fraction of the cost. The platform offers reliable blockchain nodes and network configuration across private and public protocols, allowing enterprises to create and customize enterprise-grade networks with ease. Kaleido is protocol-agnostic and committed to building products that function across public and private ecosystems.

The platform provides world-class private chain infrastructure, having run thousands of chains for enterprises. It offers customizable configuration to tailor transaction processing on a per-chain basis, public RPC for reliable blockchain access, and enterprise-grade infrastructure with ISO 27k and SOC 2 Type 2 compliance, built-in HA/DR and automatic failover.

Key features include a full feature API to make blockchain just another endpoint for accelerating d'App deployment, a full suite of digital asset capabilities for creating and managing tokens (both fungible and non-fungible), integration tools like Event Streams and REST APIs, admin dashboards for visibility into nodes and runtime, real-time blockchain monitoring and analytics, data explorer with native smart contract management, integrated key management with multiple security options, and pluggable security with click-button governance.

The chain is only 5-10% of a full solution, and Kaleido offers a full-stack of plug-and-play services to help enterprises get complete solutions to production faster. The platform is backed by Hyperledger FireFly, the first open source Supernode, which simplifies development and makes it easy to manage multiple use cases across both public and private chains from a single console.

Kaleido supports major protocols including Ethereum, Polygon, Avalanche, Hyperledger Fabric, Hyperledger Besu, Quorum, and Corda. Industries served include Banking & Financial Services, Supply Chain, Government & Public Sector, Healthcare, Media & Entertainment, Insurance, ESG & Climate, and Gaming. The platform has 1 billion+ blocks mined, 10,000+ developers across 30+ countries, and has powered 1,000+ digital transformation projects.
with: Create blockchain networks on the protocols of your choice in a fraction of the time at a fraction of the cost.
Kaleido is hands down the leader in Blockchain-as-a-service. They support the major protocols and technologies that we need across our projects.
Blockchain-as-a-Service (BaaS) providers offer the necessary cloud-based infrastructure and management tools for businesses to develop and maintain applications.
The chain is only 5-10% of a full solution. Kaleido offers a full-stack of plug-and-play services to help you get complete enterprise solutions to production faster.
Kaleido Blockchain as a Service is backed by Hyperledger FireFly, the first open source Supernode.
